#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 30 2001 at 8:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) ALL of the important druid only gear is Beastlord now, including the Velious quest armor. Yes, one existing class, which happens to be the single most popular, now gets to compete with a whole new class for the same already very rare equipment. Thanks VI you lazy scumbags. Aside from that WTF are they thinking? A shaman based class wearing druid gear?!?! These guys remind me of those dazed transients you see in the streets shouting at imaginary flying pigs, thats how much sense these idiots are making with this. Now we get to watch beastlords run around casting RotG and Circle of Misty after putting in countless months medding alone to reach the level required to get this stuff. Everytime I think that VI has done something right they turn around and act like MORONS, back to DAOC again I guess.
RE: Its not just Kunark
QuoteReply
# Feb 04 2002 at 3:52 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592251064527
110 posts
Uh.. no. All the Druid armor was accidentally tagged as BST useable in Allakhazam's database, and they are trying to change them back to the way they used to be.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Dec 23 2001 at 4:14 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) beastlord? i thot they were a shaman hybrid? i dont have expansion adn dont tlak to them much so i wouldnt know just shocked to see that the druid kunakr armor is now BL also
These Rock!
QuoteReply
# Nov 27 2001 at 12:00 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766775006
6 posts
if theres anyone out there who thinks these suck, boy have you got it backwards! Most of the ES Pieces are 2 ac less than FS Plate.... and I wouldn't call that sucking for a druid! Castman, 22 Wood Elf druid
▲ Page top
ES Gaunts
QuoteReply
# Nov 23 2001 at 4:40 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249113945
View User Forum
Scholar
118 posts
Its true, these have a longer cast time, shorter duration than ensnare, but think of it this way....0 mana. I use these to solo, the difference between using snare and ensnare is you just refresh after every cast, (and why not, its free mana) thereby allowing me to keep a better spell such as another DoT to use. Here is a little secret from a High Level druid. Drones of Doom line of spells do stack. Its probably a bug, but you can cast Drones of Droom and then Winged Death (at level 53) and they stack on top of each other, I replaced ensnare with DoD and now kill the mobs much faster. Here is my formula:

Pull to safe location by casting cancel magic. Cast root. Right click Gaunts. Drones of Droom. Right click Gaunts. Cast Winged Death. Right click Gaunts. Refresh root as needed. Sure it takes a little more work by right clicking more often, but I cant imagine mind numbing soloing without these.

This gear has great spells, and yes if they made the effect ENSNARE, It would never leave my inventory. There are so many different applications to this gear, the greaves give you a mana free heal 100 points at a time. (good soloing) The helm invisibility for those wonderful group runs with melee's, why waste the mana because they lose invis every 10 seconds. The boots, manafree levitate traveling (and keeps you from having to waste a spell slot)...need I say more. Take 1 trip to KC through Dreadlands, and Ill guarantee you would want these boots.

The gear could be better, but when you look at the applications, they really arent half bad. Its all in the creativity of how you use them. These were designed for conventional use, but they can be used in unconventional ways.
▲ Page top
RE: ES Gaunts
QuoteReply
# Dec 12 2001 at 8:49 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591768823058
View User Forum
10 posts
Actually, the only reason why they stack is because Winged Death is over 50 and there is an exception to the rules that Verant placed in that allow spells of the same type to overlap if one is above level 50 and the other is below level 50. If you try to stack Drones with any other spell of the same type under level 50, it will not work.
▲ Page top
RE: ES Gaunts
QuoteReply
# Nov 04 2002 at 6:33 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592255506510
7 posts
Actually that is now wrong info. I use Drifting death, drones of doom, immolate, and creeping crud on mobs all the time soloing. One of the patches left it so they all stack with each other. Dont believe me (like most) then cast them on yourself starting with your highest dot. The patch that changed this is the same one that lets 2 dots of the same type stack when casted by 2 different players (like 2 druids casting drones). Makes soloing just that much better for druids!

Julahni Starrkeeper
<Spirit Pack>
45 druid brell server
▲ Page top
RE: ES Gaunts
QuoteReply

Scholar
118 posts
HEY! your right...but the effects on these boots can only be cast if your level 45 or higher...the next DoT of the DoD line type is Winged Death. Besides...I was posting to get people to think about the use of items in different ways, not just sit around and whine about the effects.

#REDACTED, Posted: Sep 29 2001 at 12:21 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Read the previous posts before asking a question. lvl 45
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 23 2001 at 12:28 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) just got something to say...SHUT UP...be happy you get something like this...look at the mage items...reclaim energy....ive only used this spell once it sucks...ive never see anyone touch it later or in the beginning..im sorry you druids dont get everything at its greatest...just be happy every single one of your items doesnt do flame lick or dance of the fireflies...
RE: hmReclaim ENergy worthless???????
QuoteReply
# Jan 11 2002 at 6:47 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592757029667
13 posts
Speaking as a 52 Mage myself, I regularly use and find a lot of use in the reclaim energy from my Foci.

If you are going to lose the pet, it is often far better to reclaim and recast than try to heal. While maybe with the new infusion with luclin (supposed to be around SHeal level for our pets), which I haven;t got, we can effectively heal our pets, but at 52 prior to this combat healing was not an option.

While I admit that there could be better effects (I would kill for a right click summon companion), Reclaim Energy is far from useless.

With SoW on there have been many times that reclaiming my pet just before death, running and then recasting pet, has allowed me to win a fight I would have been gating (with that last sliver of mana) if I didn't get back about 80% of the mana needed to call a pet with Reclaim.

Uselss no, the best, no from a long shot.

Peace
▲ Page top
